intro: | Regina: Hey, {name}. I'll just call you nerd, it's easier.
| Regina: Since you decided to be a nerd today, I'll be guiding you through the questions.
Regina.correct: | Regina: Plus points to becoming more of a nerd!
Regina.incorrect: | Regina: Girl, even I knew the answer to that. Do better.
Regina.no: | Regina: You're really gonna quit now? Ugh, thanks for wasting my time, nerd!
final: | Regina: Girl, how are you THIS bad? Get ready to fail that quiz or whatever
| Regina: Now WHAT is going on inside your head?
| Regina: How bad do you have to be to get this score?
| Regina: You're almost worthy of being called your name, nerd

intro: | Rodrick: Oh great, I have to do this...
| Rodrick: Alright, {name}, let's get this over with.
| Rodrick: Try not to embarrass yourself too much.
Rodrick.correct: | Rodrick: Huh. You actually got that right. Weird.
Rodrick.incorrect: | Rodrick: Wow... that was painful to watch.
Rodrick.continue: | Rodrick: You still going, or are you done already? (Y/N):
Rodrick.yes: | Rodrick: Fine. Let's keep going, I guess.
Rodrick.no: | Rodrick: Yeah, quitting sounds about right.
final: | Rodrick: Yikes. I've seen better effort from a broken calculator.
| Rodrick: That score? Yeah... maybe don't tell anyone about this.
| Rodrick: Not great, not terrible. Mostly just... meh.
| Rodrick: Okay, that was actually decent. Don't let it get to your head.
| Rodrick: Alright, I'll admit it. That was pretty good.
| Rodrick: Whoa, okay—did NOT expect that. You actually crushed it.

intro: | Julien: So I'll be here to help you answer some questions.
Julien.correct: | Julien: Correct! Keep up the good work!
Julien.incorrect: | Julien: Oopsie, oh no! It's okay, what comes from the bottom climbs up to the top.
Julien.continue: | Julien: Do you want to continue? (Y/N):
final: | Julien: Oh, study more. If you're not gonna study what will happen on the actual quiz? :<
| Julien: Well, study more. If you're not gonna study what will happen on the actual quiz? :<
| Julien: Next time, study more. If you're not gonna study what will happen on the actual quiz? :<
| Julien: Congrats! You got three out of five, that's already high! Are you ready for your actual quiz now?
| Julien: Congrats! You got four out of five, that's high! Are you ready for your actual quiz now?
| Julien: Congrats! You got five out of five, that's so high! Are you ready for your actual quiz now?
